description: The certification fleet: every Nx project that runs the shared semantic conformance engine (tools/conformance/runner/run.ts) against an implementation adapter. This manifest is machine-diffed both directions against tag-based discovery (projects tagged layer:conformance-runner) by tools/conformance/certification/validate-certification-discovery.ts, which hard-fails on any divergence: a project moved or retired without deliberate manifest maintenance, or a new runner added without registration, breaks the authority gate instead of silently dropping out of (or never entering) certification. The `conformance` lane runs exactly this validated set. GH issue #87 M2.9.
